chunks.title: Promise of Comfort and Word of God
chunks.reason: A unified oracle announcing comfort to Jerusalem and contrasting the permanence of God's word with human frailty.

chunks.title: The Coming Shepherd and Sovereign God
chunks.reason: An exhortation to the messenger of good news followed by a description of God's power over nations.

chunks.title: Argument Against Idolatry and for Creation
chunks.reason: A rhetorical argument contrasting the smallness of idols with the greatness of the Creator who orders the stars.

chunks.title: Encouragement to the Weary
chunks.reason: A dialogue addressing Jacob's complaint and concluding with a promise of renewed strength for those who hope in Yahweh.
